Raw Fire Detections
Coloured circles represent possible fire events (clusters).
Dark grey dots show raw fire detections.
Circle colour indicates the estimated number of people
living within 3 km of each cluster.
Source: VIIRS SNPP NRT via NASA FIRMS.
Date: 2026-05-21
